digit.switchToTotalDays: Show total days left, then hours and seconds

onboarding.title: Begin
onboarding.subtitle: Set the life you hope to live.
onboarding.editSubtitle: Change your birth details or hoped lifespan.
onboarding.privacyPrefix: All your information stays on this device.
onboarding.note: Used only on your device. Countdown follows your local time zone.
onboarding.languageQuestion: Choose the voice of your clock.
onboarding.birthTimeQuestion: If you know it, add the hour you arrived.
onboarding.lifespanQuestion: How many years do you hope to live?

quotes: This day will not come again. Make it count.
You are living the fraction of time that will never repeat.
Memento mori — remember you must die, so you may truly live.
Not someday. Not when ready. Today is the whole field.
The hour does not wait for your permission to pass.
What you postpone, time steals without apology.
A life is measured in days that look ordinary until they are gone.
Wake before the day wakes you.
Small hours, honestly lived, outweigh loud years forgotten.
You do not lack time. You lack presence.
The clock is not your enemy. Drift is.
Spend today as if you had chosen it on purpose.
Every sunset is a closing chapter. Read it while it is open.
To know the end is near is to see the beginning clearly.
Courage is showing up for one more hour of your life.
Let the fear of wasting time outrun the fear of failing.
Your future self is watching what you do with this afternoon.
Silence the noise. The day is already speaking.
Gratitude is the art of not trading today for regret.
One breath, one choice, one day — that is the whole practice.
Do not hunt immortality in screens. Live what is in front of you.
The grave is patient. Be less patient with distraction.
Love, work, rest — distribute the day as if it were finite. It is.
What would you do if this were your last ordinary Tuesday?
Time is the one currency you cannot earn back. Spend with intention.
Let your mortality sharpen your kindness, not your hurry.
The best preparation for tomorrow is a today fully inhabited.
You are not behind. You are here. Begin from here.
Evening will come. What will it find you building?
Hold the day lightly, but do not drop it.
Remember death; remember therefore to live.
Heaven's clock counts down so you may count what matters up.

premium.title: Heaven's Clock Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock every theme, mood, widget, bucket, and the web clock for PC.
premium.alreadyActive: You already have Premium access on this device.
premium.feature1: All clock themes and Impact mood
premium.yearlyDesc: Renews every year. Full access while active.
premium.lifetimeDesc: Pay once. Keep every Premium feature forever.
premium.legalPrefix: Purchases are processed by Google Play.
premium.previewNote: Purchases on this screen apply locally for testing in the browser.
premium.storeNote: Purchases are processed by Google Play. Use the same Google account on all devices.
premium.purchaseFailed: Purchase could not be completed. Try again later.
premium.billingUnavailable: Billing is not available right now.
premium.productNotAvailable: This product isn't available on your account. Make sure the app is installed from Google Play.
premium.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
premium.paymentNotAllowed: Payments are blocked on this account or device.
premium.verificationFailed: Payment verification failed. Please contact support.
premium.alreadyOwned: You already own this product. Tap Restore purchases.
premium.testBody: Turn on Premium on this device without completing Play Billing.
premium.testHint: On the main screen, long-press ✦ (about 0.7s) to enable test mode, then open Premium again.
premium.testModeOn: Billing test mode is on. Tap ✦ again to open Premium.
premium.restoreFailed: Could not restore purchases. Try again later.
premium.purchaseYearlyDone: Yearly Premium activated on this device.
premium.purchaseLifetimeDone: Lifetime Premium activated on this device.
premium.restoreFound: Premium access restored on this device.
premium.restoreEmpty: No Premium purchase found on this Google account yet.

bucket.title: Bucket List
bucket.placeholder: One thing to do while I can
bucket.empty: Write one thing you do not want to postpone.

page.intro: Do not try to write 100 things at once. Answer one question, borrow one good example, and slowly collect the life you do not want to postpone.
page.inputPlaceholder: Example: Take the trip I postponed with my parents
page.emptyPage: No buckets yet. Tap a question or example to begin with one.
page.bucketLimit: Free plan allows up to 3 bucket items. Open Premium to add more?

prompts.beforeLate: What do you want to do before it is too late?
prompts.gratitude: Who do you want to thank while you still can?
prompts.place: Is there a place you must visit before you die?
prompts.learn: If money were not the issue, what would you learn?
prompts.apology: Is there an apology or reconciliation you have postponed?
prompts.body: What do you want to do for your body?
prompts.memory: What scene do you want to leave with someone you love?

suggestions.family_phone_free: Spend a full day with my parents without phones
suggestions.family_photo: Take a proper family photo and frame it
suggestions.family_letter: Write a handwritten letter to someone I am grateful for
suggestions.travel_city_week: Live for one week in the city I keep saying I will visit someday
suggestions.travel_dawn_train: Take a dawn train alone to see an unfamiliar sea
suggestions.travel_meaningful_place: Return to a place that means something to me
suggestions.learning_instrument: Start one instrument I have wanted to learn for years
suggestions.learning_language_letter: Study until I can write a short letter in another language
suggestions.learning_books: Reread 10 books that changed my life
suggestions.courage_apology: Deliver the apology I have postponed
suggestions.courage_public_start: Share even a small start on the thing fear kept me from beginning
suggestions.courage_release_regret: Name the regret that held me for too long and let it go
suggestions.health_walk_100: Walk for 100 days in a way my body will thank me for
suggestions.health_checkup: Book the health checkup I have been delaying
suggestions.health_sleep_month: Live one month without sacrificing sleep
suggestions.creation_finish_work: Finish one small work under my own name
suggestions.creation_record_year: Record this year of my life through photos, writing, or video
suggestions.spirit_no_proving: Spend one day proving nothing to anyone
suggestions.spirit_values: Write down the five values that truly matter to me
suggestions.spirit_end_today: Imagine the end of my life in a quiet place and choose today again
